nasb.text: Let my accusers be clothed with dishonor, And let them cover themselves with their own shame as with a robe.

esv.text: May my accusers be clothed with dishonor; may they be wrapped in their own shame as in a cloak!

cnv.text: 願敵對我的披戴羞辱； 願他們以自己的恥辱為外袍披在身上。

ccb.text: 愿诬告我的人满面羞辱， 无地自容。

csbs.text: 愿那些控告我的人穿上羞愧， 披戴耻辱如同披戴外袍。
